title: Dichromena marisculus
taxonomy: Dichromena marisculus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Restionaceae, commonly known as the restio family or club rush family. This family is a group of monocotyledonous plants, primarily found in the Southern Hemisphere. The Restionaceae family consists of around 300 species, with Dichromena marisculus being one of them. Dichromena marisculus is native to the coastal regions of South Africa, where it grows in sandy soils and salt spray areas. It belongs to the genus Dichromena, which is a group of plants that are often found in coastal or saline environments.
